vocab.meaning: có lợi/thuận lợi cho việc làm việc sâu/tập trung cao độ
vocab.example: I find the silent floor of the city library highly conducive to deep work, as there are zero interruptions.

vocab.meaning: một địa điểm hẻo lánh, tách biệt
vocab.example: There is a secluded spot in the local park with a small stone bench where I go to memorize my lecture notes.

vocab.meaning: thẩm mỹ tối giản (giúp tránh xao nhãng)
vocab.example: I’ve designed my home office with a minimalist aesthetic to prevent any visual clutter from breaking my concentration.
Some people need total silence, but I actually prefer a coffee shop with a bit of ambient background noise to stay motivated.

vocab.meaning: cách bố trí bàn ghế đúng tiêu chuẩn hỗ trợ cột sống
vocab.example: I usually study at my dedicated desk because it has an ergonomic setup that prevents back strain during long hours of revision.

vocab.meaning: khu vực không có sự trì hoãn
vocab.example: I treat the university study hall as a procrastination-free zone where my phone stays firmly in my bag.
The conservatory is my favorite place to read because the natural, optimal lighting reduces eye strain significantly.

vocab.meaning: thánh đường trí tuệ (nơi yên tĩnh để học)
vocab.example: My private study has become something of an intellectual sanctuary where I can immerse myself in complex theories.

vocab.meaning: sự phân chia không gian (tách biệt nơi học và nơi chơi)
vocab.example: I practice spatial compartmentalization by never studying in bed, ensuring my brain associates my desk only with productivity.

vocab.meaning: dập tắt/loại bỏ những tác nhân gây xao nhãng
vocab.example: A soundproofed study room in the campus basement is the best place to stifle distractions when finals week approaches.
